name: Planetar
damage_resistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical weapons

actions.name: Greatsword
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (4d6 + 7) slashing damage plus 22 (5d8) radiant damage.

actions.name: Invisibility
actions.description: A creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends. Anything the target is wearing or carrying is invisible as long as it is on the target's person. The spell ends for a target that attacks or casts a spell.

actions.name: Blade Barrier
actions.description: You create a vertical wall of whirling, razor-sharp blades of magical energy, up to 100 feet long, 20 feet high, and 5 feet thick. The wall provides three-quarters cover and its area is difficult terrain. A creature that enters the wall's space or starts its turn there takes 6d10 slashing damage.

actions.name: Dispel Evil and Good
actions.description: Shimmering energy surrounds and protects you from fey, undead, and creatures originating from beyond the Material Plane. For the duration, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead have disadvantage on attack rolls against you.

actions.name: Flame Strike
actions.description: A vertical column of divine fire roars down from the heavens in a location you specify. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder centered on a point within range must make a dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 4d6 fire damage and 4d6 radiant damage on a failed save, or half as m

actions.name: Insect Plague
actions.description: Swarming, biting locusts fill a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range. The sphere spreads around corners. The sphere remains for the duration, and its area is lightly obscured. The sphere's area is difficult terrain.

special_abilities.name: Multiattack
special_abilities.description: The planetar makes two melee attacks.

special_abilities.name: Angelic Weapons
special_abilities.description: The planetar's weapon attacks are magical. When the planetar hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 5d8 radiant damage (included in the attack).

special_abilities.name: Divine Awareness
special_abilities.description: The planetar knows if it hears a lie.

special_abilities.name: Innate Spellcasting
special_abilities.description:
The planetar's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 20). The planetar can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: detect evil and good, invisibility (self only)
3/day each: blade barrier, dispel evil and good, flame strike, raise dead
1/day each: commune, control weather, insect plague

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.description: The planetar has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
